selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Feature Catalog  ·  Roadmap Initiative Group
Core Revenue Management Capabilities
Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026  ·  Executive Steering Committee
23,200
Total Hours
5
Initiatives
35
Features
Netcompany

Overall Progress
Done 7 features
In Progress 12 features
In Analysis 9 features
To Do 10 features
Priority Split
P1
P2
Must Have 55% · 21 features
Should Have 45% · 17 features
Business Value
  • Enables end-to-end taxpayer lifecycle management from registration through accounting
  • Reduces manual caseworker effort via automated billing, assessments & penalty calculations
  • Directly supports Greek project delivery and future market opportunities
Market Relevance
  • Core dependency for all current and pipeline Solon Tax project implementations
  • Strengthens competitive position as a full-featured tax revenue management platform
  • €200M+ in future project pipeline contingent on platform completeness
Initiative Effort PI Window Status Priority Features
Registration
Party identifiers, org hierarchy, search enhancements
 11,866h PI 27 · PI 28 In Progress P1 14
Taxpayer Accounting
General ledger core, reconciliation & balance management
 8,064h PI 28 · PI 29 In Analysis P1 9
Billing & Assessments
Instalment plans, assessment automation, billing cycles
 2,880h PI 27 · PI 28 In Progress P2 6
Penalty & Interest
Interest calculation, credit unallocated payment segments
 TBD PI 29 · PI 30 To Do P2 4
Tax Accounts
Tax account setup, configurable thresholds, notifications
 TBD PI 29 To Do P1 2
Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026
